usage: Stable location identity locks for reusable concept art, reference frames, and scene continuity.

locations.name: 残阳坳
locations.geography: old relay village in central-southern mainland, hidden relay structure under ordinary village
locations.lighting: warm sunset before purge; firelight and smoke during purge; cold ash after purge
continuity_locks: old well remains route anchor
medicine cabinet has hidden relay sign
after episode 02 ash and charred marks persist in memory shots
locations.population_control: villagers are poor but orderly, with intact work clothes, maintained herb baskets and bow racks; Sumin shell soldiers appear only as two or three non-humanoid sealing figures, carapace legs, short spears and wax bands

locations.name: 旧驿暗道
locations.geography: underground old imperial relay route, white stone and route carvings
locations.lighting: low torchlight plus short old-array glows
continuity_locks: half relay token activates only partial routes
light lines are residual and broken
space stays narrow and practical
locations.population_control: no crowds; fugitives keep readable costume silhouettes even with dust and sweat, while pursuing shell soldiers are shown through compound-eye glints, blade-arm shadows and hard shell scraping stone

locations.name: 金河粮磨区
locations.geography: Sumin-controlled productive steam facility along river granary belt
locations.lighting: humid industrial side light, white steam layers
continuity_locks: steam technology exists for production only
all military interfaces must look ground away or sealed
locations.population_control: workers are exhausted laborers with intact tied sleeves, aprons and tools, not beggars; shell soldiers guard grain-token checks, rail carts and cellar seals in small disciplined numbers

locations.name: 金河大河与渡口
locations.geography: wide river and ferry crossing through the human granary belt, controlled by Sumin grain transport rules
locations.lighting: open humid river light, low fog layers, white steam catching side light
continuity_locks: the river must feel broad and navigable, not a decorative stream
Sumin controls transport through grain tokens and wax seals, not modern port bureaucracy
old relay water markers can carry damaged fused Sun-Moon traces
locations.population_control: boat workers, grain handlers and fugitives wear intact tied-sleeve workwear, oil-cloth capes, wet shoes, waist ropes and waterproof packets; Sumin shell soldiers appear in small inspection groups at the pier

locations.name: 河边蒸汽小镇
locations.geography: low riverside production town where mill yards, pump houses, dock homes and repair sheds overlap
locations.lighting: humid river-town daylight with steam veils and warm life color suppressed by cold inspection spaces
continuity_locks: human livelihood and Sumin production control must coexist in the same frame
military interfaces are ground away or sealed
steam technology serves grain and labor, not free military industry
locations.population_control: residents are practical townspeople with aprons, tied cuffs, oil cloth, tool loops and repaired shoes; Sumin checks use wax-white seals and cold-gray registers over the warmer town palette

locations.name: 渡河蒸汽船
locations.geography: flat-bottom steam ferry crossing Jinhe, used for grain, inspections, fugitives and hidden letters
locations.lighting: river fog and side steam obscure faces, with wet wood reflections and low industrial glow
continuity_locks: the ferry is practical and local scale
fugitives keep their base costume anchors under added waterproof layers
inspection tension comes from grain tokens, seals, deck blocking and fog
locations.population_control: use hands, ropes, wet shoes, oil-cloth packets and waist belts to show boat work; shell soldiers or inspectors appear as two or three controlled checkpoint figures

locations.name: 平原丘陵麦浪农村
locations.geography: rolling wheat countryside between central plains and low hills, a more open livable homeland image beyond Canyang Ao
locations.lighting: warm natural field light with restrained saturation, wind moving wheat rather than glossy pastoral fantasy
continuity_locks: this is livable homeland under pressure, not untouched paradise
tools, grain bags and shoes must look maintained
old relay traces can be small and half-forgotten
locations.population_control: farmers wear intact work clothes with tied cuffs, practical patches, straw hats or head cloths, repaired shoes and visible tool use; no beggar crowd

locations.name: 绝境山脉
locations.geography: vast dangerous mountain system around the border wall, of which Suohou Pass is only one narrow gate
locations.lighting: cold high-altitude contrast, fast weather changes, mountain shadow swallowing small human figures
continuity_locks: the mountains must feel monumental and dangerous, not soft xianxia peaks
compose with vertical pressure and tiny travelers
border-wall and northern silhouettes must remain distinguishable
locations.population_control: travelers add wind capes, gloves, leggings and rope buckles over existing identity costumes; avoid swapping everyone into the same snow cloak

locations.name: 北国草原秃山
locations.geography: wind-scoured northern transition land beyond Juejing Mountains, with grassland, frozen earth, bald ridges and migration tracks
locations.lighting: vast dry cold daylight, long wind shadows, sparse blue fire at night
continuity_locks: northern lands are not only white snow
the space must feel empty, dry, windy and inhabited by migrating groups
half-beast clothing remains socially structured despite harsh travel conditions
locations.population_control: use small groups, distant silhouettes, beast-ear profiles, bone markers and travel gear rather than full tribe spectacle unless the story requires it

locations.name: 肃明中枢统治中心
locations.geography: central Sumin authority space above local Qingming offices, combining spotless bureaucracy with alien insect hierarchy
locations.lighting: cold even institutional light, high walls with little warmth, clean scale that makes humans small
continuity_locks: authority must feel majestic and alien without becoming a cave hive
upper insects keep ruler-form white bureaucratic silhouettes with chitin faceplates and compound eyes
lower guards remain non-humanoid black-green carapace bodies
locations.population_control: use sparse ceremonial ranks, white-robed upper officials, shell guards, registers and memory-room entrances; no random monster swarm

locations.name: 灰烬书院
locations.geography: burned human academy and star-chart archive
locations.lighting: dim gray daylight through broken roof, occasional moon-white star-chart glow
continuity_locks: knowledge survives as fragments, songs, and scorched devices
children identifiers should feel institutional and unsettling
locations.population_control: use one or two clean white child-identifier silhouettes, hands or backs; survivors and witnesses may be ash-stained but retain scholar or travel clothing structure

locations.name: 清明院外署
locations.geography: local Qingming Court screening office with white walls and underground memory rooms
locations.lighting: cold even light, low shadow, bureaucratic stillness
continuity_locks: must contrast with dirty escape world
symmetry and cleanliness show violence as order
locations.population_control: clerks, needle attendants and door guards are clean and controlled; any insect guard must show non-humanoid shell body, compound eyes, mandible guard and wax-white bands

locations.name: 墙下集市
locations.geography: market of stateless mixed people under the southern foot of the border wall
locations.lighting: dusty side light, cramped and layered
continuity_locks: should feel lived-in, poor, practical, and suspicious
exits and wall backs matter for blocking
locations.population_control: residents are organized traders, military families and mixed-heritage survivors with intact short jackets, hidden pockets, tokens and repaired shoes; no begging crowd; patrols appear as distant shell soldiers or grain-token checks

locations.name: 锁喉关
locations.geography: narrowest pass of Juejing Mountains, black stone border-wall gate
core_visuals: exposed old fused Sun-Moon array base
locations.lighting: snow-night contrast, cold torches, harsh side wind
continuity_locks: giant beast attack shown through shadow, impact, and gate vibration
old fused Sun-Moon array remains under Sumin white-wing black-sun overlay
locations.population_control: Gray Wall soldiers are military households with patched padded coats, old armor plates and snow wraps, not generic refugees; Sumin grain controllers or shell soldiers hold gates and stores in small visible groups
forbidden: large CG monster close-up by default

locations.name: 鸣骨岭
locations.geography: snow ridge outside wall, bones half-buried and wind making flute tones
locations.lighting: overcast snow light, low blue fire for close faces
continuity_locks: use sparse detail and sound identity
northern presence remains limited and intimate
locations.population_control: keep people minimal and intimate: Lu Mi traces, rescue marks, distant herd shadows and one small fire; no tribe camp, no large army, no crowd

locations.name: 寒鸦堡
locations.geography: old human fortress converted into insect military office
locations.lighting: low cold interior light with wet membrane reflections
continuity_locks: must feel like human architecture occupied by insect governance
archives sealed in wax are key visual clue
locations.population_control: Li Tang must read as a tall non-humanoid mantis combat caste pressing into the frame; corridor patrols, archive guards and interrogation guards are shell soldiers with carapace, compound eyes, mandible guards, blade arms or short spears, not human officers

locations.name: 月下盟书旧驿
locations.geography: old relay core behind border wall, treaty chamber with multi-faction marks
locations.lighting: moon-white platform glow, residual gold-red route lines, collapse dust
continuity_locks: treaty is not imperial throne room
multi-faction seals must be visible
victory remains incomplete after main scroll burns
locations.population_control: party costumes remain distinguishable even under dust; pursuers use Bai Yi's clean white ruler-form silhouette plus a few shell soldier shadows, never a monster swarm
forbidden: full clean treaty scroll after Bai Yi burns it

locations.name: 坍塌烽燧
locations.geography: broken old imperial beacon tower connected to relay escape route
core_visuals: fused Sun-Moon flag cloth pressed into snow mud
continuity_locks: final choice uses broken flag cloth and treaty page, not triumphant full flag
locations.population_control: human clothing is wind-pressed and snow-dusted but intact; Bai Yi stays unnaturally clean, while shell soldiers are shown through blade arms, carapace footprints and short spear silhouettes in the snow
